---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report incorrect, outdated, or missing documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

What's wrong with the documentation?

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Outdated (references old versions or deprecated features)
- [ ] Missing documentation for existing feature
- [ ] Unclear or confusing explanation
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue

## Location

Where is the issue? (Provide link or file path)

**Example**: `docs/DESIGN.md`, line 123 or README.md "Installation" section

## Current Content

What does the documentation currently say? (Quote or screenshot)

## Suggested Fix

What should it say instead?

## Additional Context

Any other information to help improve the documentation.
